name: @firegrid/durable-corpus
description: T1 red corpus for Firegrid.Durable — one frozen test per law, emitting the T0 ratchet JSONL protocol.

scripts.build: NUGET_PACKAGES=${NUGET_PACKAGES:-$PWD/../../.nuget/packages} dotnet tool run fable -- Firegrid.Durable.Corpus.fsproj -o dist --optimize --noCache --noRestore
scripts.corpus: pnpm run build && node dist/Program.js corpus run all
scripts.diagnostics: echo '@firegrid/durable-corpus diagnostics are covered by F# compile'
scripts.lint: echo '@firegrid/durable-corpus lint is covered by F# compile'
